findings.blocker: Three compounding Lean-engineering walls (NOT mathematics; all math ingredients axiom-clean). W1: any Spec-dependent instance introduced via letI/haveI/have (e.g. `Module R` on the tile carrier) hoists into a noncomputable auxiliary def and fails codegen ('failed to compile definition, consider marking it as noncomputable because it depends on Spec'); `noncomputable lemma` is rejected ('theorem subsumes noncomputable'). W2: `IsScalarTower R R_g (tile-carrier)` will not elaborate — 'failed to synthesize SMul ↑R (tile-carrier)'; the tile carrier carries only `Module R_g`. W3: whnf/isDefEq timeout even at maxHeartbeats 4000000 on the carrier-rfl and the two scalar-compat defeqs through modulesSpecToSheaf + restrict functor.

attempts.strategy: Assemble the 5-step descent with letI installing the native R-module structure on the tile carrier (via inferInstanceAs of the modulesSpecToSheaf.obj F instance on the defeq image-open carrier)
attempts.code_tried: letI : Module R ((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (modulesRestrictBasicOpen g F)).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op ⊤)) := inferInstanceAs (Module R ((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj F).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op ((specBasicOpen g).ι ''ᵁ ...))))
attempts.lean_error: failed to compile definition, consider marking it as 'noncomputable' because it depends on 'Spec', which is 'noncomputable'
attempts.insight: W1: a Spec-dependent Module instance introduced by letI hoists to a noncomputable aux def and fails codegen, even inside a Prop-valued lemma.

attempts.strategy: Mark the whole lemma noncomputable to dodge W1
attempts.lean_error: 'theorem' subsumes 'noncomputable', code is not generated for theorems
attempts.insight: noncomputable is rejected on a lemma/theorem; cannot suppress codegen this way.

attempts.strategy: Build IsScalarTower R R_g explicitly via @IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul with an explicitly-passed SMul, all Module R / SMul R passed inline by @ to dodge W1
attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize instance of type class SMul ↑R ↑((modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (modulesRestrictBasicOpen g F)).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op ⊤))
attempts.insight: W2: the IsScalarTower type needs a registered [SMul R M] on the tile carrier, but it carries only Module R_g; even passing SMul explicitly, of_algebraMap_smul's internal [SMul R M] stays unsynthesised and the genuine mod-F SMul only stays transparent if introduced fully inline.

attempts.strategy: Raise maxHeartbeats to 4000000 to push the carrier-rfl / defeq checks through
attempts.lean_error: (deterministic) timeout at `isDefEq`, maximum number of heartbeats (1000000) has been reached [then persisted at 4000000]
attempts.insight: W3: the hdesc2 := hdesc carrier-rfl (σ.restrictScalars R = F-restriction over image opens) plus the two tile_scalar_compat(') defeqs through modulesSpecToSheaf are too heavy for whnf/isDefEq even at 4M heartbeats.

attempts.strategy: Leave the named target absent (no sorry papered); preserve the mathematically-complete 5-step sketch + the precise W1-W3 wall analysis as an in-file comment block; verify the load-bearing map identity by a scratch example
attempts.insight: Confirmed by a scratch `example` (both as a section identity and as a LinearMap) that the tile restriction map over V IS F's restriction over the image open ι ''ᵁ V by rfl on the underlying type — the load-bearing map identity the descent rests on. The blocker is purely Lean-engineering (instance plumbing + defeq performance), scoped to a follow-up mathlib-analogist.

next_steps: Dispatch a mathlib-analogist (api-alignment) on underlying-type restrictScalars / IsScalarTower transport with the W1-W3 error state attached. Resolution route (named in-file): write the entire descent+transport as ONE inline `exact @...` term — no letI/have for any Spec-dependent instance, all Module R / SMul R passed inline so earlier @-positions feed later ones, IsScalarTower via @IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_smul with the explicit genuine mod-F SMul, e0/e1 inlined as ((mod F).presheaf.mapIso (eqToIso ...)).toLinearEquiv inside IsLocalizedModule.of_linearEquiv/_right; then attack W3 with show/change to cut the carrier-rfl defeq load. Consider whether the design shape (installing Module R on a modulesSpecToSheaf.obj carrier) is the real bottleneck — a cross-domain or api-alignment consult may suggest phrasing the descent on the F-side carrier from the start, avoiding the dynamic-instance install entirely.

attempts.strategy: General-open V version of the iter-044 tile_scalar_compat (V=⊤): rewrite both scalar actions via the smul bridges then discharge the residual ring identity with the general-open ring identity, applied elementwise
attempts.code_tried: rw [modulesSpecToSheaf_smul_eq F]; rw [show ... modulesSpecToSheaf_smul_eq (tile) V ...]; rw [modulesRestrictBasicOpen_smul_eq']; congr 1; (congrArg (·.hom r) (tile_section_ring_identity' g V)) + simp [CommRingCat.comp_apply] + convert ... using 2
attempts.lean_error: (none — axiom-clean; needs set_option maxHeartbeats 1000000 for the carrier convert)
attempts.insight: The V=⊤ route-(A) template generalizes verbatim to arbitrary V once the general-open ring identity and smul bridge are available. The V=D(f̄) instance is the planner's flagged NEW sub-need for the keystone leaf.

next_steps: Consumed by tile_section_localization at V=D(f̄). Needs a blueprint block (general-V companion of lem:tile_scalar_compat).

attempts.strategy: General-open V version of tile_section_ring_identity (V=⊤): post-compose the V=⊤ identity with the restriction ι ''ᵁ V ≤ ι ''ᵁ ⊤ in a calc; fold LHS by ← Functor.map_comp, push RHS through the two open-immersion section isos
attempts.code_tried: calc ... rw [Category.assoc, ← Functor.map_comp]; congr 2; exact Subsingleton.elim _ _ ... rw [show (Spec R).presheaf.map (homOfLE hV).op = ...]
attempts.lean_error: Tactic `rewrite` failed: Did not find an occurrence of the pattern (homOfLE hV).op ≫ ?m in target ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso R).inv ≫ (Spec R).presheaf.map ((homOfLE ⋯).op ≫ (homOfLE hV).op) = ...)
attempts.insight: Raw Scheme.Hom.appIso_inv_naturality has a generic Y.presheaf RHS form that does NOT rw-match (Spec R).presheaf.map (homOfLE …).op syntactically even when printed identically.

attempts.strategy: Wrap appIso_inv_naturality in matchable form (appIso_inv_res) with explicit homOfLE/image opens; add appIso_inv_res_assoc for use inside a longer ≫ chain
attempts.code_tried: private lemma appIso_inv_res ...; rw [Scheme.Hom.appIso_inv_naturality f (homOfLE h).op]; congr 1; ... simp only [Category.assoc]; rw [appIso_inv_res (specBasicOpen g).ι hV1 hV, appIso_inv_res_assoc (basicOpenIsoSpecAway g).inv (le_top) hV1]
attempts.lean_error: (initial: 'No goals to be solved' on a stray congrArg/Subsingleton line; removed) then clean
attempts.insight: Wrapping the Mathlib naturality lemma in explicit homOfLE/image-open form fixes the rw-match; the _assoc folded variant is needed when the rewrite target is buried in a ≫ chain (the bare form gave 'did not find occurrence' because Category.assoc had not re-associated it).

next_steps: Consumed by tile_scalar_compat'. Needs a blueprint block (general-V companion of lem:tile_section_ring_identity); bundle appIso_inv_res / appIso_inv_res_assoc into its \lean{}.

next_steps: Consumed by tile_scalar_compat'. Needs a blueprint block (general-V companion of lem:modulesRestrictBasicOpen_smul_eq).
